# Snore Scope

> A zero-dependency Progressive Web App that records and analyzes snoring from iPhone Safari. All audio and metrics stay on the device (IndexedDB). No server, no telemetry, no account.

Audit, fork, and reuse are explicitly welcome — for humans and AI assistants alike. The entire application is three files.

## Source

- [index.html](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prowotion/snore-app/main/index.html): Full app — HTML, CSS, JS. Contains audio capture (getUserMedia + MediaRecorder), the snore detection state machine (RMS + FFT 60–400 Hz, duration 0.3–3 s), metric computation (score, respiratory rate, regularity), IndexedDB persistence, and the UI (home, recording, detail views).
- [sw.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prowotion/snore-app/main/sw.js): Service worker — network-first for HTML, cache-first for static assets.
- [manifest.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prowotion/snore-app/main/manifest.json): Web App Manifest for iOS "Add to Home Screen".
- [icon.svg](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prowotion/snore-app/main/icon.svg): App icon.

## Docs

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prowotion/snore-app/main/README.md): Install guide, tech stack, tunable parameters, limitations.
- [LICENSE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prowotion/snore-app/main/LICENSE): MIT.

## Audit focus areas

- **Privacy**: verify no network egress for audio or user data. Only `navigator.serviceWorker.register` and the initial asset fetch should touch the network.
- **Detection algorithm**: `SnoreSession._tick` in index.html — thresholds `rms > 0.018` and `lowRatio > 0.42`, window 0.3–3.5 s.
- **Metric formulas**: `computeMetrics` in index.html — score weights (0.45 frequency, 0.3 intensity, 0.25 loud-percentage), stability from coefficient of variation on inter-event gaps.
- **iOS PWA behavior**: Wake Lock usage, MediaRecorder continuity, IndexedDB blob storage.

## Repository

https://github.com/prowotion/snore-app
